item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, prioritas kepentingan masyarakat memang sering ditekankan, tetapi ini bukan berarti hak individu tidak dihargaai.

notes: Agent A begins with clear support for society-first priority, then shifts toward a balance frame where individual rights are protected and neither side should always dominate. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, with only limited acknowledgment that balancing societal needs is complex. Agent B turn 4 contains non-Latin script inside an English sentence: "集体利益和individual rights".
